# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a research preprint with concrete empirical results from a real-world repository sample.

## Why

The excerpt describes a work-in-progress empirical study of 466 open-source software projects, including a defined repository selection method, dataset construction, and reported results on adoption, structure, and evolution of AGENTS.md and related AI configuration files. That is real evidentiary substance, not generic commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
